name: codex-sdk-vs-ex-test
description: POC: CodexAppServer as a VS Code chat participant — streams responses, preserves sessions across turns, and bridges tool approvals.

chatParticipants.name: codex
chatParticipants.description: Codex AI agent — edits files, runs commands, and explores your codebase

chatParticipants.name: copilot-cli
chatParticipants.description: GitHub Copilot CLI agent — coding and terminal tasks via Copilot CLI

chatParticipants.name: claude
chatParticipants.description: Claude Code agent — edits files, runs commands, and explores your codebase

codex.binaryPath.description: Absolute path to the codex binary. Leave empty to auto-discover via PATH.

copilot.binaryPath.description: Absolute path to the GitHub Copilot CLI binary. Leave empty to auto-discover via PATH.

claude.binaryPath.description: Absolute path to the Claude Code binary. Leave empty to auto-discover via PATH.

codex.mcpServers.description: MCP server configuration passed to Codex.

copilotcli.mcpServers.description: MCP server configuration for the Copilot CLI participant. Each key is a server name; values must have either `command` (stdio) or `url` (HTTP/SSE). Auto-discovery of .mcp.json and .vscode/mcp.json in the workspace is always on.

env.description: Environment variables for the server process.

workingDirectory.description: Working directory for the server process.
